// updating the updated_at column in case the object was updated
Thank you for your interest in participating in **Quicko** (the "Program").
This Program is designed for individuals, businesses, influencers and brands interested in promoting products and services through affiliate marketing activities.

These terms and conditions (the "Agreement") outline the eligibility requirements, participation guidelines, and program rules applicable to all Promoters. By joining and participating in the Program, you ("Promoter", "you," or "your") agree to enter into a binding agreement with **Quicko Infosoft Private Limited** ("we," "us," or "our") having our place of business at **B-701, Amrapali Lakeview Tower, opposite Vastrapur Lake Road, Vastrapur, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380015**.

By participating, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to comply with this Agreement, along with our [Terms of Use](https://help.quicko.com/portal/en/kb/articles/terms-conditions-of-use) and [Privacy Policy](https://help.quicko.com/portal/en/kb/articles/privacy-and-security?utm_source=com-quicko&utm_medium=direct&utm_campaign=com.quicko.footer&_gl=1*s1b0j0*_ga*Njg3MDAyMTcxLjE3MjE0OTI2NDE.*_ga_T1ER0WTD8M*czE3NTA2ODUxMDYkbzI1JGcwJHQxNzUwNjg1MTA5JGo1NyRsMCRoMA).

This Program allows you to promote our products and services as independent Promoters through affiliate marketing activities. Participation is solely for marketing and promotional purposes and does not create any employment, agency, partnership, or joint venture relationship between you and us.
The Program is open to individuals, influencers, brands, and businesses interested in affiliate marketing.
To help your promotional efforts, you will have access to essential tools and resources, including:
You can create and manage multiple unique referral links, customized for different channels, audiences, and campaigns to maximize your reach.

All referral activities—such as sign-ups and purchases will be tracked through the designated affiliate platform. Your performance metrics will be consolidated under your account, allowing you to monitor both overall and individual link performance, analyze results, and optimize your promotional strategies.

We provide you with access to **Cliq**, an affiliate marketing software that helps you track and manage your referral activities effectively. This software serves as the central hub for you to oversee their entire affiliate performance, from link wise activity to commission tracking.
View comprehensive data on overall performance, including: Monitor key analytics such as total commission generated, valid sign-ups, completed purchases, and revenue earned over time.
Create and manage affiliate links. View the individual performance of each link to campaign effectiveness.
Gain detailed insights into Referral behavior—see which plans were purchased, when the sign-ups occurred, and the value of each transaction—to refine outreach and target more effectively.
- Easily export comprehensive reports summarizing sign-ups, purchases, and commissions within a chosen time frame.
- Reports also serve as a verifiable record of performance, promoting transparency and accountability.
Our Program is designed to reward you based on your performance, offering incentives for your efforts and achievements.
1. Only applicable if no. of signups are greater than or equal to 25
2. Total Revenue generated is less than 1 lakh
1. Total Revenue generated is less than 5 lakh
1. Total Revenue generated is greater than or equal to 5 lakh
- All rewards under the Program are settled in **Indian Rupees**, directly between us and you.
- Cliq does not process, manage, or facilitate any financial settlements. Its role is limited to providing software-based tracking, analytics, and report generation functionalities.

- The reports generated via Cliq may be used as a basis for calculating commissions and rewards. However, all aspects of financial settlement—including payouts, timelines, invoicing, and dispute resolution—are exclusively our responsibility and must be coordinated directly with us.
- Cliq bears no responsibility for any delays, discrepancies, or issues arising in connection with payments made under the Program.
### Role of Cliq as an Affiliate Marketing Software

- Cliq operates solely as an Affiliate Marketing Software that provides functionalities such as referral tracking, performance analytics, and report generation. Its role is limited to offering technical tools that facilitate the operational tracking and reporting needs of Programs.
### No Participation in Financial or Legal Relationships
- Cliq is not a party to any agreement between us.

- It does not engage in, manage, or oversee financial transactions, settlements, or any contractual or legal relationships. All commercial arrangements, obligations, and payments are handled directly between us.
Cliq shall not be held liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages arising from the use of its platform, including but not limited to:
- Inaccuracies, delays, or failures in referral data tracking due to technical limitations, user error, or third-party interferences.
- Discrepancies in performance metrics, report generation errors, or temporary system outages.
- Any financial disputes, payment issues, or obligations between us.
- Misuse, unauthorized access, or improper use of the platform by either party.

- All aspects related to financial dealings—including commission payouts, settlements, invoicing, and dispute resolution—is exclusively our responsibility. You are required to address any financial or program-related concerns directly with us. Cliq shall bear no responsibility for any such matters.
- Cliq provides its services on an "as is" and "as available" basis.
- It makes no warranties, whether express or implied, regarding the continuous availability, accuracy, or reliability of its platform.
- To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Cliq expressly disclaims all liabilities arising from the use or performance of its software.
To maintain the integrity of the program, you must follow these guidelines and refrain from:
- Engaging in self-referrals or creating multiple accounts to fraudulently generate commissions.
- Using bots, scripts, automation tools, or fake identities to artificially inflate referral numbers.
- Misrepresenting our brand, products, services, or policies in any promotional communication, including exaggerations, false claims, or unauthorized messaging.
- Engaging in spam tactics such as unsolicited emails, misleading advertisements, or irrelevant postings in forums, groups, or social platforms.
- Running campaigns that encourage non-genuine sign-ups (e.g., users with no real interest in the promoted services).
- Violating applicable laws, regulations, or infringing on third-party rights during promotional activities.
- Investigate any suspected breach or suspicious activity linked to your account.
- Withhold, delay, or revoke commissions if fraudulent, abusive, or non-compliant behavior is detected.
- Suspend or permanently terminate your participation in the program for violations of these terms.
- Take legal action or pursue remedies to recover damages arising from misconduct.
All decisions made by us in this regard shall be final and binding.
By participating, you are expected to promote responsibly and adhere to the following:
- **Accurate Representation:** Communicate the program's offerings honestly and factually. Avoid making false claims or misrepresentations.
- **Ethical Marketing Practices:** Do not engage in spamming, misleading tactics, or unsolicited outreach.
- **Proper Use of Brand Assets:** Use only authorized logos, creatives, and promotional materials provided by us. Unauthorized modifications or misuse of brand assets are prohibited.
- **Appropriate Promotion Channels:** Do not promote through offensive, illegal, deceptive, or untrustworthy content or platforms.
You may be disqualified from the program if you:
- Engage in prohibited activities as mentioned above.
- Fail to comply with brand guidelines, promotional standards, or ethical practices.
- Conduct actions that harm our reputation, business interests, or customer trust.
- Modify, suspend, or terminate the program at any time, with or without prior notice.
- Update these Terms & Conditions periodically. Continued participation after such updates will indicate your acceptance of the revised terms.
- Adjust reward structures, commission rates, eligibility criteria, or program benefits at their sole discretion.
It is your responsibility to review the latest Terms & Conditions regularly.
- Referral tracking depends on browser cookies and related technologies.
- Factors like private browsing, ad blockers, or third-party software may affect tracking accuracy.
- We are not liable for commissions lost due to technical limitations beyond their control.
- While reasonable efforts will be made to ensure accurate tracking and payouts, occasional system issues, platform updates, or verification delays may impact processing timelines.

- We may collect, store, and use data related to referral activities, affiliate performance, and user interactions for the purposes of administering the Program, ensuring compliance, monitoring performance, and preventing misuse or abuse of the Program.
- All personal and referral data will be handled in accordance with the applicable Privacy Policy, as made available to participants.
- By participating in the Program, you provide your consent to the collection, processing, and retention of such data for the purposes outlined above.
- These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the Laws of **India**.

- Any disputes, claims, or legal proceedings arising out of or in connection with the Program shall be subject to the jurisdiction of courts as mutually agreed upon by both parties at the time of dispute.
- For any questions, clarifications, feedback, or dispute resolutions related to the Program, you may contact us at **[help@quicko.com](mailto:help@quicko.com)**.`;
